message:
style(tui): fix 55 clippy warnings across 11 TUI modules

Fixes pedantic/nursery clippy lints in non-contested TUI files:
- input.rs: option_if_let_else (x2), manual_let_else
- model.rs: derive_partial_eq_without_eq, cloned→copied (x2), struct_excessive_bools, cast_lossless
- telemetry.rs: option_if_let_else, cast_possible_truncation, float_cmp (x2)
- adapters.rs: needless_pass_by_value, redundant_clone
- theme.rs: match_same_arms
- widgets.rs: cast_precision_loss
- parity_harness.rs: manual_assert
- test_replay.rs: unreadable_literal (x2), dead_code
- test_artifact.rs: single_option_map, cast_possible_truncation (x3), io_other_error
- test_fault_injection.rs: redundant_clone, needless_borrows_for_generic_args (x2), field_reassign_with_default

Remaining 43 warnings are all in render.rs (42) and update.rs (1),
which are actively edited by other agents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

     }

     TelemetryResult::unavailable("no telemetry backend available".into())
